ogTitle: Narrung vs Neales Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Narrung vs Neales Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narrung, South Australia and Neales Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Neales Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Narrung (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narrung or Neales Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narrung has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Neales Flat scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narrung scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Neales Flat scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narrung or Neales Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Neales Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
